name: Xirmooyinka Hemostatic Nabarka
description: Ku xidhid boogta aan la isku dhejin karin ama isgoysyada leh faashad dhiig-baxa si loo xakameeyo dhiig-baxa halkaasoo aan dalxiiska lagu isticmaali karin.
steps: Don galoofyada Si buuxda u soo bandhig nabarka adiga oo isticmaalaya xiirid dhaawacyada.
Aqoonso isha dhiigbaxa firfircoon ee ku dhex jirta daloolka dhaawaca.
Fur faashad hemostatic ah oo si adag ugu xir nabarka fartaada, adigoo si toos ah ugu riixaya isha dhiigbaxa.
Sii wad xirxirida ilaa daloosha dhaawaca si buuxda loo buuxiyo.
Ku mari cadaadis toos ah oo joogto ah ciribta gacantaada ugu yaraan 3 daqiiqo.
Ha ka saarin wax baakad ah marka aad codsato.
Ku dabool faashad cadaadis ah nabarka baakadaysan.
Ku calaamadee wakhtiga kaadhka TCCC ama foodda bukaanka (tusaale, 'PKD 0145').
warnings: Ha xirin nabarrada laabta gala -- isticmaal shaabadda laabta beddelkeeda.
Haddii aad xidhidhaysid nabar qoorta ah, cadaadis saar adigoon isku cadaadin labadaba carotids isku mar.
Dib u qiimee 5 daqiiqo gudahood haddii isha halbowlaha laga shakiyo.

pediatric.note: Isticmaal faashad saami ahaan ka yar. Codso cadaadis khafiif ah si aad uga fogaato isku-buuqa laabta ee dhallaanka.

obstetric.note: Ka fogow cadaadiska baakad qoto dheer ama gardarro ah oo u dhow caloosha gravid. Kordhinta degdega ah ayaa la door bidaa.
